# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: myazurefunctionapp
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: 2018-11-01
    location: westus
    identity: 
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      name: myazurefunctionapp
      siteConfig:
        appSettings: []
    dependsOn:
      - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/myStorageAccount
    resources:
      - name: customassignment
        type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
        apiVersion: 2019-04-01-preview
        properties:
          roleDefinitionId: "/subscriptions/<subscriptionId>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/*"
          principalId: "[reference('Microsoft.Web/sites/myazurefunctionapp', '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"

  - name: myStorageAccount
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    location: westus
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      isHnsEnabled: false
      allowBlobPublicAccess: true

  - name: mykeyvault
    type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    location: westus
    properties:
      accessPolicies: []
      sku:
        name: standard

  - name: 'mySQLServer/myDB'
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01-preview
    location: westus
    properties:
      maxSizeBytes: 268435456000
      zoneRedundant: false
      sku:
        name: GP_Gen5_2
        tier: GeneralPurpose

  - name: myCosmosDBAccount
    type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    location: westus
    properties:
      locations:
        - failoverPriority: 0
          locationName: westus
      databaseAccountOfferType: Standard
